title: Polish: liquid glass everywhere, animations, signing, perf pass

tasks.title: Liquid glass audit: toolbar, panels, popovers in GlassEffectContainer; dark/light tuned
tasks.notes: Glass clusters (toolbar, history panel, layers panel) each wrapped in a tight GlassEffectContainer. Canvas surround is now appearance-adaptive (underPageBackgroundColor) instead of forced black; fixed pre-existing empty-state bug where the ZStack hugged the toolbar width and painted a visible background column. Style popover now uses the system popover chrome (killed the phase-3 halo); width dots sit on a faint quaternary track ring; white swatch rings became .primary.opacity for light mode. Verified with real-app screenshots in dark+light (NSRequiresAquaSystemAppearance toggle) and the /tmp/photonz-style-harness showcase rebuilt against current sources.

tasks.title: Micro-animations: tool transitions, layer add/remove, callout placement spring
tasks.notes: Toolbar: accent circle slides between tools via matchedGeometryEffect; style button and crop options scale/fade in with the capsule resizing on one spring (animation on activeTool + selectedLayerID). Layers panel rows animate add/remove/reorder (animation on panelLayers ids). Callout placement flight converted from easeOut to CASpringAnimation(perceptualDuration: 0.45, bounce: 0.25) on position/bounds/cornerRadius with easeOut fades for chrome. Verified: full style harness (31 checks) re-run green; new callout harness (/tmp/photonz-p7/ch) asserts spring runs, settles without stuck animations, and tears down to the live composite (undo clears red border pixels).

tasks.title: App icon refinement + About panel + onboarding empty-state
tasks.notes: Icon: baked drop shadow + glyph lift shadow, tamer sheen (0.35→0.18) so the violet carries, aperture blades clipped inside the ring, hairline rim highlight; regenerated AppIcon.icns. About: CommandGroup(replacing: .appInfo) opens the standard panel with credits (tagline + site link); NSHumanReadableCopyright added to Info.plist in build-app.sh. Empty state: glass onboarding card with three actionable rows (Open ⌘O, Capture ⇧⌘4, Paste ⌘V — paste opens a document when none exists). Verified via screenshots of the rebuilt app; About panel is the stock AppKit path, build-verified only.

tasks.title: Perf pass against budget (16ms/12MP/10 layers); dirty-rect rendering if needed
tasks.notes: Budget met: 6.7ms median interactive re-render (was 52.4ms full render). Two pieces, both TDD'd: (1) content cache in DocumentRenderer — text/annotation rasters keyed by (LayerContent, raster px size), CIImage wraps keyed by CGImage object identity (re-register invalidates naturally), 32+32 LRU (ContentCacheTests, 5 tests); (2) dirty-rect incremental path — RenderDiff in PhotonzCore computes the dirty region (visualBounds = transform bbox + previewPadding + border + callout chrome; callout source coupling iterated to fixed point; 13 tests), renderInteractive patches it into a persistent buffer via context.render(toBitmap:bounds:) and snapshots with an explicit copy (IncrementalRenderTests, 10 tests, cold-render oracle over every pixel). RenderScheduler now calls renderInteractive. Gotcha fixed along the way: compositeImage now crops to canvas extent (layers outside the canvas used to grow the rendered frame). Probe data: 12MP GPU pass + readback floors at ~15ms on this machine, so full-frame rendering could never hit 16ms. Numbers in docs/progress/perf.md.

tasks.title: Developer ID signing + notarization in release.yml (needs Apple Developer secrets)
tasks.notes: Wired conditionally: release.yml gates on APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY (job env HAVE_SIGNING) — imports the p12 into a throwaway keychain, builds with CODESIGN_IDENTITY (build-app.sh signs Developer ID + hardened runtime + timestamp when set, ad-hoc otherwise), then notarytool submit --wait + stapler staple/validate on the DMG. Without secrets the pipeline runs exactly as before (ad-hoc). Required secrets documented in release.yml comments and docs/design/release.md. NOT yet exercised end-to-end: needs the user to create the Apple Developer secrets; the secret-present path will get its first real test on the next tagged release after that. Verified locally: YAML parses, ad-hoc path unchanged, CODESIGN_IDENTITY path reaches codesign.

tasks.title: Keyboard shortcut audit + menu completeness (matches macOS conventions)
